news.t: Major S&P Indices Set for a Rejig: Here’s What to Know
Vanguard Small-Cap ETF Ranked Best US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs
Buy Low, Sell High with Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Revenue ETF
Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze

holdings.infoBox: RWJ is an equity ETF with a total of 592 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at 3.55%, World Kinect at 2.85%, United Natural Foods at 2.25%, CarMax at 1.92%, and Group 1 Automotive at 1.35%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Revenue ETF (RWJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P SmallCap 600 Revenue-Weighted index. The fund tracks an index of S&P SmallCap 600 Index stocks that are weighted by revenue. RWJ was launched on Feb 22, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Major S&P Indices Set for a Rejig: Here’s What to Know
data.text: Top S&P Dow Jones indices, including the S&P 500 (SPX), the S&P MidCap 400 (MDY), and the S&P SmallCap 600 (RWJ), are set for a major reshuffle later this month.

data.title: Vanguard Small-Cap ETF Ranked Best US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs
data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several top US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows over the last 90-days, 30-days, and 7-days.

data.title: Buy Low, Sell High with Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Revenue ETF
data.text: Consumer discretionary companies – makers of nonessential consumer goods and services – compose 27% of the fund's assets.

data.title: Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze
data.text: A trio of small-cap exchange-traded funds from Invesco cruised higher Wednesday, boosted by frenzied buying of heavily-shorted stocks like GameStop Corp. , Bed Bath and Beyond , and Macy's . The Inves...
